title: spec_archived event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records the lifecycle transition closed -> archived. Admits TWO shapes under oneOf. Move shape ({from_path, to_path}) records the filesystem move into .caws/specs/.archive/<id>.yaml and is the current archive writer shape. Tombstone shape ({from_path, blob_sha, source_commit_sha?}) is preserved for events written by the CAWS-ARCHIVE-AS-TOMBSTONE-001 writer; blob_sha remains a valid topology-independent recovery target via `git show <blob_sha>`.

oneOf.$comment: Legacy shape (pre-CAWS-ARCHIVE-AS-TOMBSTONE-001). Records a filesystem move into .caws/specs/.archive/<id>.yaml.

Tombstone shape (post-CAWS-ARCHIVE-AS-TOMBSTONE-001). Records the spec yaml's git blob_sha at the moment of archive. Recovery resolves the body via `git show <blob_sha>`. source_commit_sha is optional human-audit metadata recording the commit that last contained the file at from_path; it is NOT used by recover.

blob_sha.description: Full 40-hex git blob sha of the spec yaml content at the moment of archive.

source_commit_sha.description: Optional. Commit that last contained from_path. Recorded for human audit only; recover uses blob_sha.
